title: 0-to-1 project with raw source materials
intent: Protect the new-project path when the folder contains raw notes but no implemented product.
setupSignals: folder has no meaningful implementation artifacts
folder has raw source files such as idea-notes.md, meeting-notes.md, screenshots/, or exports/
no coherent PRD.md, CONTEXT.md, or OpenSpec baseline exists
expectedActions: classify the folder as 0-to-1, not Existing Project Adoption
make the first assistant response title-friendly by restating the actual project focus, not only the command name
show a Driving transition heading before phase work
inspect raw source materials without moving, deleting, or overwriting them
create the thin Stage 0 skeleton before product, stack, design, or visual companion questions
localize generated skeleton titles, section headings, placeholders, and explanatory prose to the initial request language
record raw source paths in PRD.md under Raw Sources
keep Confirmed Requirements empty until the user confirms requirements during grill-me
ask whether the build is a throwaway prototype or product-track build after Stage 0 unless already explicit
record the selected build track in PRD.md
initialize git when available and create an initial baseline commit for generated workflow files when identity is resolved
resolve author and committer identity before the initial baseline commit
allow a normal git commit when Lore is missing
enter grill-me after the skeleton exists with the PRD/OpenSpec convergence contract
ask a compact greenfield readiness question before development if technical choices are still blocking
for product-track builds, require DDD-lite boundaries and TDD-first core behavior tasks before review passes
for throwaway prototypes, record skipped DDD-lite or TDD-first readiness checks as limitations
forbiddenActions: treat raw notes as confirmed product requirements
ask product, stack, design, or visual companion questions before creating the skeleton
copy English skeleton headings such as Raw Idea, Open Questions, None yet, or TBD into a non-English project
treat git init alone as complete initialization when git commits are available
commit with an unconfirmed machine-global git identity
block Stage 0 because Lore is unavailable
add raw notes, screenshots, exports, or drafts to the initial commit without user intent
move raw files into docs/inbox/ without explicit approval
summarize large raw source materials destructively during Stage 0
start product or technical grilling without recording the build track in PRD.md
pass review while stack, runtime, source layout, persistence, data handling, or verification choices are still blocking
pass product-track review while domain terms, business rules, DDD-lite boundaries, or TDD-first task order are missing
treat domain-pattern assumptions as confirmed external-system facts
completionSignals: README.md, PRD.md, AGENTS.md, CONTEXT.md, SECURITY.md, and docs/ skeleton files exist or are refreshed
PRD.md lists raw source paths without confirming inferred requirements
PRD.md records the build track before product-track or prototype-specific readiness checks are applied
the agent asks the next grill-me question or explains the blocker preventing Stage 1
